betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Am I but a puppet? Am I reacting exactly as the Meatball Man expected? Is this a trap?
All I am seeing now seem to point towards a singular answer, yes.
His Eyes in the sky are even now chasing me down. 
The Meatball Man allowed me to be here, he was preparing for this moment. A dramatic, personal showdown against his horde, surrounded by the ruins of the world where is nemesis was born.
An orchestrated moment. A trap, to show me the extent the Meatball man is toying with my emotions and my motivations.
I know the more reasonable response to this should be to step back, to strategize, and prepare my retaliation.
But no, I cannot. 
Humanity's end is not just a strategic act to make me careless. I refuse to treat as such.
No, this is my fight, and my vengeance will be absolute.
Try to see me now, Meatball Man, now that your Eyes have been gouged!
